title: poa repens
intro: Poa repens, also known as the smooth meadow-grass or creeping meadow-grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa repens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
